Product_Description:
Product Description   Our amazing Ride-On Car is the ideal push toy for toddlers 18 - 36 months! This versatile car can support a maximum weight of 50 pounds. It has an extra-wide rear parent grasp handle for added comfort when guiding their children. This car's "whisper ride" wheels provide a smooth and quiet ride, allowing your child to easily cruise around the neighborhood. Our Ride-On Car has an easy-latch adjustable seat belt. It has a real car horn and steering wheel, which adds to the immersive play experience. The under-hood storage box is ideal for storing snacks and toys, making this car more engaging than a standard toddler wagon or stroller. It's never been easier to clean up after playtime. Simply wipe away messes with a disinfectant wipe or home cleanser and enjoy the simplicity of keeping things clean and fresh. The Ride-On Car, like all our items, is built to last, with a sturdy double-walled plastic design that ensures years of use. The brilliant colors are resistant to chipping, fading, cracking, and peeling, guaranteeing that the automobile looks good even after a lot of play. Allow your child to experience the thrill of driving their very own Ride-On Car.   Brand Story   By   
  From the Manufacturer   Celebrate the 10th Anniversary of the Push Around Buggy with this new pink edition. Cute character buggy for enjoyable push and ride fun. Sections.Title: Wiggle Toddler Car for Ages 3+
Texts: Encourage kids to be active indoors or out with this fun wiggle scooter, which is constructed from durable plastic with no gears, batteries, or pedals. Your little one can simply twist, wiggle, and go in this kids ride on car, for a smooth, quiet, and entertaining activity that provides year-round fun for ages 3 and up.

All your child needs to get moving in this wiggle car ride on toy is a smooth, flat surface, either indoors or out. Appropriate riding surfaces include linoleum, concrete, asphalt, or tile. Note: the Lil Rider Wiggle Car is not recommended for use on wood floors, and is intended to be used under the direct supervision of an adult.

This wiggle bike is made from rugged, high-quality plastics that are free of banned phthalates and durable enough to hold up to 110-pounds of weight, for season after season of safe, active fun. These toddler riding toys are also safety tested and provide healthy exercise because they are kid-powered rather than battery-powered.

In addition to encouraging physical activity both indoors and outside, toddler riding toys like this wiggle car help your little rider develop and refine their gross motor skills like balancing, coordination, and steering while also encouraging your child to be active and independent while they pretend play that they are driving a car just like mom or dad.

Product_Description: Product Description   Keep your little one entertained for hours with the Ride on Toys by Lil’ Rider. This wiggle car ride on toy is a great way to keep your toddlers active and having fun indoors or out with no gears, pedals, or batteries to worry about. Made of durable plastic and free of banned phthalates, these kids’ toys are safe to use and have a weight capacity of 110lbs. The kid toys provide miles of enjoyment for children ages three and up — simply twist, wiggle, and go.   From the Manufacturer   Looking for a children's toy that will delight, fascinate, and invigorate for years to come? Come to the rescue with the perfect toy: The revolutionary new Lil' Rider Wiggle car. It's like magic, but you don't need to be a magician to get it to work. The Lil' Rider? Wiggle car is a mechanical marvel that makes use of that most inexhaustible of energy sources, kid-power, by harnessing the natural forces of inertia, centrifugal force, gravity, and friction. It's so easy to operate; all it needs is a driver and a smooth, flat surface. It doesn't require an expensive power source that needs constant replacement. No batteries, no power-cells, no liquid fuel-just the occasional cookie or two. It's quiet too-the only sound you'll hear is the sound of its wheels. It provides kids with plenty of exercise, more so than most toys. And the Lil' Rider? Wiggle car is engineered to be absolutely safe when used appropriately.

evidenceHighlights.text: WIGGLE CAR RIDE ON - Kids can simply twist, wiggle, and go in this toddler car that has no gears, batteries, or pedals for a quiet and entertaining activity year-round. The riding toys are designed to stimulate your child's imagination and creativity.

DEVELOPS MOTOR SKILLS - The ride on car helps your child develop and refine motor skills like balancing, coordination, and steering. The Lil’ Rider kids ride on toys are made with a low base with a double triangle structure for secure riding.

Product Description Keep your little one entertained for hours with the Ride on Toys by Lil’ Rider. This wiggle car ride on toy is a great way to keep your toddlers active and having fun indoors or out with no gears, pedals, or batteries to worry about. Made of durable plastic and free of banned phthalates, these kids’ toys are safe to use and have a weight capacity of 110lbs. The kid toys provide miles of enjoyment for children ages three and up — simply twist, wiggle, and go. From the Manufacturer Looking for a children's toy that will delight, fascinate, and invigorate for years to come? Come to the rescue with the perfect toy: The revolutionary new Lil' Rider Wiggle car. It's like magic, but you don't need to be a magician to get it to work. The Lil' Rider? Wiggle car is a mechanical marvel that makes use of that most inexhaustible of energy sources, kid-power, by harnessing the natural forces of inertia, centrifugal force, gravity, and friction. It's so easy to operate; all it needs is a driver and a smooth, flat surface. It doesn't require an expensive power source that needs constant replacement. No batteries, no power-cells, no liquid fuel-just the occasional cookie or two. It's quiet too-the only sound you'll hear is the sound of its wheels. It provides kids with plenty of exercise, more so than most toys. And the Lil' Rider? Wiggle car is engineered to be absolutely safe when used appropriately.
Wiggle Toddler Car for Ages 3+

Encourage kids to be active indoors or out with this fun wiggle scooter, which is constructed from durable plastic with no gears, batteries, or pedals. Your little one can simply twist, wiggle, and go in this kids ride on car, for a smooth, quiet, and entertaining activity that provides year-round fun for ages 3 and up.

All your child needs to get moving in this wiggle car ride on toy is a smooth, flat surface, either indoors or out. Appropriate riding surfaces include linoleum, concrete, asphalt, or tile. Note: the Lil Rider Wiggle Car is not recommended for use on wood floors, and is intended to be used under the direct supervision of an adult.

Product_Description: The John Deere Sit 'N Scoot Tractor is a perfect first ride on tractor for young farm fans. Made for little fans of John Deere toys, this foot-to-floor tractor toy features traditional John Deere yellow and green coloring along with official logos, it's just like the real thing only smaller. This kid-powered foot-to-floor tractor puts kids in control of the motion and provides them with plenty of fun and exercise as they imitate the work they see done around the farm or in the yard. This toy tractor is made for hours of fun in the sun with durable construction and sturdy rolling wheels that make it ideal for both indoor and outdoor play. From riding around in the backyard to playing in the sandbox, this versatile toy is sure to be a hit all spring and summer long. The lightweight and stable riding design make it easy for toddlers to maneuver. The John Deere Sit 'N Scoot is a great addition to your toddler easter basket stuffers or birthday gifts for toddlers 18 months and up to 60 pounds.

This toy tractor is made for hours of fun in the sun with durable construction and sturdy rolling wheels that make it ideal for both indoor and outdoor play. Perfect for toddlers ages 1-4, this versatile scooter combines long-lasting quality with the joy and freedom of outdoor play. evidenceHighlights.text: 2 RIDES IN 1: The Scoot 2 Scooter grows with your child. Start in ride-on mode for seated scooting, then flip the base to convert into a 4-wheel scooter when they're ready - no tools required. Great for backyard, sidewalk or neighborhood rides.

STABLE AND DURABLE: Built with a sturdy frame and a 4-wheel base, this scooter for toddlers provides extra stability for beginner riders. Kids build balance and confidence while parents enjoy lasting quality that provides years of fun.

GREAT BEGINNER RIDE: Designed for toddlers ages 1-4, this versatile scooter is the perfect first ride-on and scooter combo, providing active play and an easy transition from seated scooting to big-kid riding.

BELOVED ICON OF PLAY: For over a century, Radio Flyer has inspired joyful play with wagons, trikes, and more. As a Certified B Corp, we create lasting products that spark imagination while caring for future generations.

The Radio Flyer Scoot 2 Scooter is designed to grow with your little one, offering two rides in one for years of active play. Toddlers can start out scooting in ride-on mode, then flip the base to easily convert into a 4-wheel scooter – no tools required. A sturdy frame and durable wheels provide stability and confidence for beginner riders, while under-seat storage adds extra fun by letting kids bring toys and treasures along for the adventure. When the time comes, flip the deck to transform the riding toy into a scooter with an adjustable handle – designed to continue growing alongside your child for years. Perfect for toddlers ages 1-4, this versatile scooter combines long-lasting quality with the joy and freedom of outdoor play. As a Certified B Corp, Radio Flyer is proud to create products that spark imagination while helping preserve the planet for future generations.

Sections.Title: From the manufacturer
Texts: Coaster toys are a great way to teach sharing along with the concept of patience. Remind kids to stay clear of the track as others ride down!
Over 9 ft. of up and down riding track is included! The back-and-forth play (like slides), encourages physical activity as kids reset the coaster car to ride again.
Wide, non-slip stairs allow easy platform access, where the coaster car sits in recessed wells for stability. The coaster car includes molded-in foot rests, handrail, and high back for a secure ride.
Kids will ride, and parents will “hide” this roller coaster toy! Simply take apart the pieces and they neatly tuck away for compact storage when playtime fun is done.

Climbing on and off the coaster car requires physical dexterity and helps develop gross motor skills during playtime. And similar to a slide, kids learn to balance on a coaster toy, using their core strength as they cruise down the track. Plus, the “back and forth” nature of coasters (like slides) encourages physical activity.

The easy return style of the coaster car allows kids to reset the coaster all on their own to keep playtime going – and builds confidence the more they do it! At first, they might need help from Mom and Dad to climb onto the car. The more they play, the more comfortable they’ll be with balancing and using the toy all on their own.

Coaster toys are typically used in outdoor play areas, so they open kids up to new sights and sounds not found in their usual daily routine. The quick movement down the track introduces new sensory concepts like feeling the wind on their face and the sound of the wheels on the track.

Coasters are designed as single-rider toys, making them a great option to teach sharing along with taking turns and the concept of patience. Kids will also expand their vocabulary as they play with words like “coaster”, “climb”, and “car”.

Engage your child with STEM concepts as they play! Ask questions that pertain to the coaster toy like, “What happens when you push off lightly?” and “Why does the car stop at the end?”. As the coaster car comes down the track and stops on the bare ground, as your child to explain the difference between the two terrains. They’ll get an extended lesson in STEM learning and sensory exploration as they describe their thoughts and feel the difference on and off the coaster car. Show and tell your child how the roller coaster toy works and goes together. Through repetition, they’ll get the hang of it and feel proud they can operate the toy on their own – with parental supervision!

Product_Description: With the Step2 Up and Down Rapid Ride and Hide Roller Coaster Toy for Kids, you can experience the excitement of an amusement park right in the comfort of your own house. This fantastic toy provides the thrill of a 9ft roller coaster track and an ATV-inspired ride-on car, encouraging your child to play independently and actively. During hours of thrilling pleasure, watch their faces light up with joy. This roller coaster toy is ideal for outdoor summer enjoyment because it is designed for active play in any setting. But don't let the winter months dampen your spirits! Bring the adventure inside to keep the kids busy and amused all year. This toy's adaptability is limitless. With its space-saving storage feature, you can easily store and organize this rideable toy. The coaster sections simply separate, allowing you to keep your environment clutter-free and orderly. This roller coaster is designed with convenience in mind, with simple assembly and compact dimensions of 12.75" H x 110" W x 27" D. For even more track and excitement, consider the Step2 Farther and Faster Coaster Track Expansion: Second Edition (sold separately), which adds an extra 4 feet of track. Please note that this expansion pack is not compatible with other extension packs.

customers_say: Customers find the ride-on car to be a great first ride toy that's cute and sturdy, with good value for money. The car makes sounds and is easy to assemble, though opinions about assembly are mixed. While some customers say it holds up well, others report it being easily broken. The instructions receive negative feedback for being vague.
